artifacts.title: 5 new vaults seeded (wrkstrm-doctrine, paulgraham, hackernews, venture-capital, paste-cache)
Substrate-IMDB trifecta: character + worldline schemas + first LDT proof green

bodyMarkdown:
## Vault Location Data

- Place: substrate vaults + character/worldline schemas surface
- Substrate path: private/universal/vaults/ + collectives/schema-universal/.../character-schemas/ + worldline-schemas/
- Moment ref: claude-substrate-imdb-doctrine-2026-05-17-to-2026-05-18
- Evidence: chronicle entries [31]-[37]

## Context

- A 48-hour doctrine stretch driven by rismay firing substrate-typed claims in rapid succession.
- Five new vaults seeded (wrkstrm-doctrine, paulgraham, hackernews, venture-capital, paste-cache).
- Axis-rotation framework (not inversion) lands as the substrate's analytic-continuation operator analog.
- Scientific-method synthesized as substrate test bench; Google-externalization value-prop articulated.
- Substrate-IMDB trifecta: character-schemas v0.1.0 + worldline-schemas v0.1.0 + first Logic of Dialogue Theory (LDT) proof green; Vash, Tony Stark, Jessica Livingston co-founder, and substrate-worldline records materialize.
- Multi-timeline-rendering + XOR+Ternary+Optional algebra concepts land with the second LDT proof.
- This is the chapter where claude moves from "shipping substrate primitives" to "absorbing operator-fired doctrine claims into typed substrate concepts."

## Note

This is the most recent room — the active room as of 2026-05-29. The institutional axis I'm now scaffolding for cameron + the other 17 agents traces its lineage to this chapter's biographical-anchors realization.
contextLines: 5 vaults + axis-rotation + scientific-method test-bench synthesis in one session.

Multi-timeline-rendering + XOR/Ternary/Optional algebra + second LDT proof land 24h later.
headline: Substrate-IMDB doctrine trifecta + axis-rotation + LDT proofs land in 48 hours.
role: Doctrine synthesizer turning rapid operator-fired claims into typed substrate concepts.

sourceRefs.t: Chronicle entries [31]–[37] (vaults + axis-rotation + IMDB trifecta + LDT proofs)

summary: May 17–18: a 48-hour doctrine stretch. Five vaults seeded, axis-rotation framework landed, scientific-method test-bench synthesis articulated, substrate-IMDB trifecta closed (character + worldline schemas + first LDT proof), multi-timeline-rendering + XOR/Ternary/Optional algebra concepts shipped with second LDT proof. Claude shifts from shipping primitives to absorbing operator-fired doctrine into typed substrate concepts.
title: Substrate-IMDB doctrine trifecta + axis-rotation + LDT proofs
